/usr/bin/c++  -g   CMakeFiles/ambient-device.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ambient-device.dir/src/controllers/ambient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ambient-device.dir/src/controllers/idle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ambient-device.dir/src/dfwimpl/app_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ambient-device.dir/src/dfwimpl/state_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ambient-device.dir/src/app/background_provider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ambient-device.dir/src/app/clock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ambient-device.dir/src/app/size_calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ambient-device.dir/src/app/style.cpp.o  -o build/ambient-device -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libdfw.so /usr/local/lib/libtools.so /usr/local/lib/libdansdl2.so /usr/local/lib/libldtools.so /usr/local/lib/liblm.so -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2_mixer -lSDL2_image -lGL -lstdc++fs
